title: Dry powder composition for inhalation comprising tiotropium or pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof
abstract: Provided is a dry power composition including tiotropium or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof, and also including a micronized lactose and a non-micronized lactose as excipients in a specific weight ratio. When the dry powder composition is formulated as a capsule, the content of the active ingredient in each capsule may be uniform, and the delivered dose uniformity and stability of the active ingredient of tiotropium may be improved. Therefore, the dry powder composition may be effectively used to treat respiratory diseases.
claims: Claims ( 13 ) A dry powder composition comprising: tiotropium or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof; a micronized lactose; and a non-micronized lactose, wherein a weight ratio between the micronized lactose and the non-micronized lactose is about 1:1.5 to about 1:19. The dry powder composition of claim 1, wherein the pharmaceutically acceptable salt of tiotropium is tiotropium bromide. The dry powder composition of claim 1, wherein an amount of the tiotropium or the pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof is about 0.018 wt% to about 0.90 wt% based on a total weight of the dry powder composition. The dry powder composition of claim 1, wherein the micronized lactose has an average particle size of about 10 ã to about 30 ã. The dry powder composition of claim 4, wherein the micronized lactose has an average particle size of about 15 ã to about 20 ã. The dry powder composition of claim 1, wherein the non-micronized lactose has an average particle size of about 45 ã to about 130 ã. The dry powder composition of claim 1, wherein the non-micronized lactose comprises medium-sized fine lactose and large-sized fine lactose, the medium-sized fine lactose and the large-sized fine lactose are satisfy a weight ratio of about 9:1 to about 1:9. The dry powder composition of claim 7, wherein the medium-sized fine lactose has an average particle size of about 45ã to about 70 ã. The dry powder composition of claim 7, wherein the large-sized fine lactose has an average particle size of about 90 ã to about 130 ã. A method of preparing a dry powder composition, the method comprising: i) obtaining a mixture of a micronized lactose with tiotropium or a pharmaceutically acceptable salt thereof by triturating, sieving, and mixing them ; and ii) sieving a non-micronized lactose, adding the sieved non-micronized lactose to the mixture of step i) to satisfy a weight ratio of about 1:1.5 to about 1:19, and mixing a resulting mixture. The method of claim 10, wherein, in the sieving in the step i), a sieve mesh size is about 50 ã to about 250 ã. The method of claim 10, wherein in the sieving of the step ii), a sieve mesh size is about 280 ã to about 700 ã. A capsule formulation for inhalation filled with the dry powder composition of any one of claims 1 to 9.
